subject: Create scripts/verify_all.py unified verification entrypoint
description: Implement scripts/verify_all.py that runs db init+seed, pytest, eval thresholds, optional UI e2e, and provenance/manifest/hash-chain verification. Support --check-invariants quick mode, exit non-zero on first failure, machine-readable output, and produce evidence file .sisyphus/evidence/task-29-verify-all.txt by running quick mode.
